overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rainy, neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The character navigates past vending machines and graffiti-covered walls, walks under a massive overpass, and ascends a stairway into an upper-level walkway illuminated by pink neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with vending machines and graffiti-covered storefronts

events.description: character stands up from crouching position and begins walking forward

agents.ego_description: character walks along the rain-slicked sidewalk past illuminated vending machines and walls covered in colorful graffiti

entered.detail: row of black vending machines with glowing screens advertising Solosil Machistador
glass storefront covered in colorful neon graffiti tags and spray paint
massive concrete highway overpass spanning across the street ahead
tall street lamp casting yellow-orange light through the foggy rain

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking along a wet concrete sidewalk at night, passing illuminated vending machines and graffiti-covered walls. The scene is lit by neon signs and street lamps, with a large overpass visible in the foggy distance ahead.

events.description: character moves from sidewalk onto the asphalt street surface beneath the overpass
vehicle with bright headlights drives past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: character walks down the center of the rain-slicked asphalt street toward a large building with prominent neon signage, passing under the massive concrete overpass

notable_agents.action: car with headlights on drives past the character on the right side
pedestrian walking in the opposite direction toward the character

entered.detail: large multi-story building with prominent El Guapo neon signage and multiple illuminated windows
several parked vehicles lining the right side of the street under the overpass
traffic signal showing red light mounted on a pole

segments.scene_description: Moving from the sidewalk onto the street, the character walks beneath a massive concrete overpass toward the El Guapo building. A car passes by on the right, and a pedestrian approaches from the distance. The wet asphalt reflects the neon lights and street lamps overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairway ascending under overpass with pink neon lighting

events.description: character turns left and begins ascending the wide concrete staircase

agents.ego_description: character climbs the concrete stairs leading upward, transitioning from street level to the upper walkway, with intense pink neon lights visible through the fog ahead

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with metal railings leading up to the upper level
intense pink neon lights illuminating a metal gate structure at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character turns and begins ascending a wide concrete stairway beneath the overpass. Pink neon lights glow intensely at the top of the stairs, illuminating the foggy air. The El Guapo building falls behind to the left as the character climbs higher.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level urban walkway with neon billboards overlooking the street

events.description: character emerges from the stairwell onto the upper level walkway with different lighting and perspective

agents.ego_description: character walks along the elevated concrete walkway, passing large billboards and looking down at the street level below

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking on the upper level walkway ahead

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard advertising Brain Dance with a portrait image
elevated concrete walkway with metal railings overlooking the lower street

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto the upper walkway, the character continues forward past the Brain Dance billboard. The perspective overlooks the lower street where the character previously walked, with the overpass now visible below. The foggy night atmosphere continues with neon lights illuminating the elevated path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy, neon-lit city street that gradually ascends into an elevated urban walkway. It begins on a wet concrete sidewalk, passing illuminated vending machines and graffiti-covered walls as a massive overpass looms in the foggy distance. As the character moves onto the street, the scene shifts beneath the concrete overpass toward the El Guapo building, where the wet asphalt reflects the surrounding street lamps and neon signs. The camera then follows the character as they turn to ascend a wide concrete stairway, moving away from the building and toward an intense pink neon glow that permeates the foggy air. Finally, the perspective emerges onto an upper walkway past a Brain Dance billboard, overlooking the lower street and the overpass below under the persistent haze of the neon-lit night.
